name: 6p21_33_OR_TRIM_cluster
description: 6p21.33 olfactory-receptor (OR) and TRIM family paralog cluster, distal/centromeric to the MHC. Contains ~20 OR2/OR5/OR12 paralogs and the TRIM10/TRIM15/TRIM26/TRIM27 cluster. The 7-stage SD-paralog map of Bailey 2002 places this immediately distal to the MHC and partially overlapping the class-I extended haplotype. Independent CNV polymorphism in healthy populations.

architecture.internal_structure: Mixed tandem array of ~20 OR paralogs (OR2/OR5/OR12 families) at 85-95% identity plus TRIM10/15/26/27/31/40 tandem cluster at 80-95% identity; OR cluster is one of the largest in the genome.
